section_1.title: Executive Summary
section_1.content: A high-level overview of the system health across the 5 monitored assets.

section_2.title: Asset Health Matrix
section_2.logic: Identify assets where Health = 1 (Faulty) vs Health = 0 (Healthy). Provide specific metrics from dt_analytics like Performance and Efficiency.

content_requirements.priority: Rank by criticality (e.g., Pump Efficiency < 20% is Critical)
content_requirements.tools_required: Specific hardware or software tools needed for the repair

section_4.title: Cost-Benefit & Enterprise Impact
section_4.focus: Compare the cost of the maintenance tasks against the impact on RAD (Risk Assessment) and overall production uptime.
